creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-05-16 21:30:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/brickshooter   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  brickshooter is a small puzzle game, where you'll have
  to clear the central area from different colored bricks. Three or
  more same colored bricks that touch will vanish. You can shoot
  bricks into the playing field from the fringes.
  
  WWW: http://bilious.homelinux.org/~paxed/brickshooter/
  
  PR:             ports/123540
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3 at amdmi3.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1204    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/games/brickshooter/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/brickshooter/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/brickshooter/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/games/brickshooter/pkg-plist (new)
